data.title: Navbar polish: home mobile wordmark vertical center + Story page hamburger alignment

data.body:
Review pass. Issue 1 (home mobile wordmark): all four plan-specified changes verified in src/components/layout/Navbar.tsx within the lg:hidden home block — parent flex items-start → items-center; mono

paddingTop:8px dropped (other style keys preserved); Fractal fontSize clamp(24px,4.5vw,42px) → clamp(32px,6vw,42px); Collective fontSize clamp(14px,2.63vw,25px) → clamp(18px,3.5vw,25px). Diff is exactly 4 insertions / 4 deletions in a single file — home-scrolled, inner-page, and full-desktop-home variants untouched. pnpm typecheck clean. Visual validation (vertical center + larger wordmark at 375px / 414px / 768px / 1023px) deferred to human per plan. Issue 2 (Story hamburger): impl agent followed the plan's 'acceptance if cause is NOT found' clause and documented investigation in commit body — checked Navbar route-invariance, StoryPage

styles, OriginStory overflow-hidden + diagram sizing, PhotoGallery FadeIn transforms, GalleryImage sizing, index.css globals, App.tsx route wrapper, descendant overflow. No code-level cause identified. Issue 2 remains OPEN pending a user screenshot at 375px showing the misalignment on /story vs another page so we can isolate visually.
